response.justification: Maria is a strong generalist engineer with ~15 years of software development experience, solid TypeScript/Node.js skills, cloud exposure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes), and demonstrated teaching/workshop leadership. However, her AI-specific experience is limited to roughly one year at re:cinq working on MCP code generators and agentic tooling, falling far short of the required 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions. There is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or data pipeline work for AI systems, which are core to this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: 15+ years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic-workflow infrastructure, directly relevant to key technologies listed
Proven mentorship and stakeholder-facing skills through workshops, courses, and conference talks
concerns: Only ~1 year of AI-related experience versus the required 8+ years building production AI solutions
No demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines
No evidence of leading technical discovery with enterprise customers or transitioning AI prototypes to production at scale

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and MCP/agentic tooling exposure
